text: A black and white picture of a jail cell with a toilet and sink inside.
A table with a computer, lamp, a couple of drinks and assorted books.
A city street at night with a tall tower at the end of a road.
A bus is on the street preparing to pick up passengers.
Unzipped suitcase on floor with cat peeking out of compartment.
A group of elephants, some large and one small, in the water
Tennis players look at the ball on a tennis court.
A man wearing denim jeans, grey shirt and red hat throwing a Frisbee.
A couple of cows standing on a dirt road.
An open microwave hat has a measuring cup with liquid in it.
